workItemSearch.description: Search and query Azure DevOps work items

workItemWrite.description: Create and update Azure DevOps work items

analysis.description: Analyze requirements, generate test cases, suggest child items

project.description: Project-level metadata queries (work item types, etc.)

link.description: Manage work item links and relations

repository.description: Browse repositories and read code files

attachment.description: Upload file attachments to work items and check file readability

relationship.description: Read parent context and create auto-linked child work items

pipeline.description: Pipeline, build, release, variable group, and agent pool operations

wiki.description: Create, update, and manage Azure DevOps Wiki pages

testPlan.description: Test plans, test suites, test cases, test runs, and code coverage

org.description: Organization-level operations: teams, service connections, work item history, cross-project search

search.description: Specialist agent for finding and querying work items

writer.description: Specialist agent for creating and updating work items

analyst.description: Specialist agent for analyzing requirements, test plans, and generating suggestions

pipeline.description: Specialist agent for CI/CD pipeline, build, and release management

wiki.description: Specialist agent for documentation and wiki page management
